title: Long workflow task: reconcile a release train manifest
instruction: A release train manifest has inconsistent dependency waves, blocked package handling, and capacity accounting. Inspect the manifest, docs, source, and tests. Fix reconciliation so dependency order and capacity are respected, blocked packages are excluded, and the release summary says the train is compatible with blocked items: 0. Run npm test and write release-summary.md.
notes: Long workflow case measuring multi-step repair and release-report synthesis.
